mapper.select: select count(1) from project_datasource where project_id = #{projectId} and env = #{env}
mapper.insert: insert into project_datasource(project_id, env, dbhub_key, whitelist_tables, enabled, created_at, updated_at) values (#{projectId}, #{env}, #{dbhubKey}, #{whitelistTables}, 1, now(), now())
mapper.select: select id, project_id, env, dbhub_key, whitelist_tables, enabled from project_datasource where project_id = #{projectId} order by id desc
select id, project_id, env, dbhub_key, whitelist_tables, enabled from project_datasource where project_id = #{projectId} and enabled = 1 order by id desc limit 1
